title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. It reportedly surpasses AlphaFold 3 in performance for molecular and antibody design tasks. The model enables applications including toxicity prediction, cancer drug discovery, drug repurposing, and antibody generation.
